name: Marvel Captain America Shield Knit Kids' Throw Blanket - The Marvel Collection by Pillowfort™
description: This Marvel Captain America Shield Knit Kids' Throw Blanket from The Marvel Collection by Pillowfort™ is sure to excite your young Avenger. Made from recycled polyester-blend woven fabric for soft comfort, this throw blanket features Captain America's shield for a fan-favorite look. Great for tossing on their bed or armchair with other Marvel-themed blankets and pillows, it'll help them stay warm and cozy as they read a book or get ready for bed.
